pi_items.source: task.json description matches expected address substring in verifier.py logic
verifier.py normalize_string comparison (line 109-113); verified via web search as real Toronto postal code area
verifier.py normalize_string comparison (line 116-120); real Ontario province code
Web search confirmed M5J 2J2 is real postal code in downtown Toronto, Ontario, Canada. Used for test data.
verifier.py phone normalization (line 73); web search confirmed 555 prefix is reserved for fictional/test use in North American Numbering Plan
verifier.py string comparison (line 140-144); clearly fictional test email address
setup_oscar.sh line 7 hardcoded URL; matches login.do endpoint in task description
setup_oscar.sh lines 209-222 configure oscardoc account; line 236 updates security table with this username
setup_oscar.sh line 217 confirms 'oscardoc account configured (password: oscar, PIN: 1117)'
setup_oscar.sh lines 217, 375 confirm PIN is 1117; also referenced in setup_task.sh and task.json description

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims verified as correct for test environment. Patient 'Emily Williams' is synthetic test data created within the OSCAR EMR environment. Contact information uses real Canadian postal codes (M5J 2J2 in Toronto, L5B 1M5 in Mississauga for initial state) but fictional phone numbers with 555 prefix (reserved for fictional use in NANP) and test email. OSCAR EMR is real open-source software from McMaster University; test credentials (oscardoc/oscar/PIN:1117) are configured in setup scripts. All data is test/synthetic and created locally via scripts, not from external data sources.
